rows.label: qev087203_MSG0002
rows.name:
It wasn't enough to save them.
I lost soldiers. ...Good ones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0003
rows.name: Those Avalanche were your escorts, sir.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0004
rows.name:
Keeping you alive was their mission.
I'm sure they have no regrets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0005
rows.name: He never would have let this happen...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0006
rows.name:
With respect, comparing yourself
to those who are no longer with
us won't get you anywhere, sir.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0007
rows.name:
But Tatsu is glad Secretary
is safe. Team Tatsu should
hurry and tell mustache man.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0008_2
rows.name:
Do me a favor— head back to the city
and file a report on all this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0009
rows.name: You're not coming with us, sir?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0010
rows.name: There's something I need to do first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0012
rows.name:
It's nice to be reminded we've got
a leader worthy of the position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087203_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'll hang on to these
until you're all revived.[ST:wait ]
